_about: Acme Architects is a FICTIONAL, placeholder architecture firm created for this assessment (any resemblance to a real firm is coincidental). This is its firm-library overlay on top of Acelab's catalog: it captures the firm's APPROVED products and hard-won standards as INTENT and lessons-learned — not as a clean element-type -> product table. Bridging a model element to the right standard, then to an approved product that actually meets the requirements, is the work.

standards.intent: Acoustic ceilings in open-plan office areas
standards.context: Applies to lay-in ceilings over open workstations. In our models these are usually modeled as generic Compound Ceilings until a product is selected.
standards.lessons_learned: We standardized on high-NRC (>=0.80) Class A tiles after acoustic complaints on the Voss project. Avoid anything below 0.75 in open offices no matter how good the price. HumiGuard-equivalent humidity resistance is required near rooftop units.

standards.context: Rooms flagged as Restroom / Locker / Pool. Must resist sag.
standards.lessons_learned: Mineral fiber sags in humid rooms; prefer fiberglass or coated tiles rated for high humidity. Do not reuse the open-office tile here even though it's approved there.

standards.intent: Exterior rainscreen cladding on the building envelope
standards.context: Applies to exterior walls / curtain-wall spandrel zones. Combustible-facade rules apply above podium.
standards.lessons_learned: NFPA 285 compliance is non-negotiable on anything over 40 ft. Terracotta and fiber cement have been our reliable choices; ACM only where we've confirmed the tested assembly. Budget cladding at < $12/sf almost never meets our wind-load needs on tall facades.

standards.intent: Resilient flooring in corridors and high-traffic areas
standards.context: Applies to Floors in circulation spaces. Slip resistance and thick wear layer matter.
standards.lessons_learned: 20 mil wear layer minimum in commercial corridors; 12 mil wears through in ~3 years. FloorScore/Greenguard emissions cert is required for our healthcare and education clients. Watch moisture limits on slab-on-grade.
